params.prompt: Create a premium 4:5 Instagram PROGRAM GRAPHIC for Limitless Club. Concept: cinematic AI masterclass stage. Dark luxury black stage, glowing blue holographic agent interfaces floating around an empty executive podium, chrome/silver accents, editorial serif title. Required text: LIMITLESS CLUB; HERMES AGENT; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; Build the team that never sleeps.; คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; Chief of Staff Agent; Content Agent; Vibe Coding Agent; สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Composition must be clean with large readable title and very controlled decorative details. 4:5, premium, no extra logos, no misspelled duplicate text, safe margins.
